title: 113 年國中教育會考 - 英語聽力
subject: 英語聽力

questions.text: 聽力題目：
options: The bird is on the girl's shoulder.
The bird is flying over the girl's head.
The bird is sitting on the girl's head.

questions.text: 聽力題目：
options: The boy is eating and the girl is looking at him.
The boy and the girl are drinking from the same glass.
The boy and the girl are drinking together.

questions.text: 聽力題目：
options: It's a picture of a town.
It's a picture of the country.
It's a picture of a train station.

questions.text:
聽力題目：
Do you have any brothers or sisters?

聽力題目：
How long does the movie last?

聽力題目：
My dog died last night. I'm so sad.

聽力題目：
Would you like some more meat?

聽力題目：
Why do you call your cat Milky?

聽力題目：
How long has it been since you last saw Jason?

聽力題目：
Have you decided where to go for your vacation?

聽力題目：
What did you get for your birthday?

聽力題目：
W: Oh no, the coffee machine is not working again. I really need a cup of coffee right now.
M: Let me see. I think you forgot to put water in.
W: Oh, I'm so stupid. I just checked the coffee beans and turned the machine on.
M: Well, problem solved.
Question: Why is the coffee machine not working?

聽力題目：
M: Excuse me, how can I get to City Zoo?
W: You can take Bus 941 to the train station, and then take a taxi there. Or you can take Bus 703 to East Market, and then walk for about 5 minutes.
M: Which one is faster?
W: The first one. But it costs more.
M: Oh, I'm not in a hurry, and I want to save some money.
W: Then taking Bus 703 is a better choice for you.
Question: How will the man probably go to City Zoo?

聽力題目：
M: Do you see the theater?
W: Yes. It's across the street.
M: Good. Walk past the theater, and turn left on West Street.
W: OK. Turn left on West Street.
M: Go straight for one block. It's next to the pet shop. I'll wait for you there.
W: Got it. See you soon.
Question: Where will the man and the woman meet?

聽力題目：
M: Have you seen these pictures?
W: Wow. Where was this taken?
M: That's me in London. I went there to study English for three months last year. I took the picture with my host family.
W: I see. How about this one? The beach looks beautiful.
M: Oh, my sister and I took a trip to Hawaii this summer.
W: Cool. I want to visit these places, too.
Question: What are the man and the woman talking about?

聽力題目：
W: Did you enjoy the pizza last night?
M: Yes, it was great. Did you order it online?
W: No, someone sent it to the wrong house. My neighbor got it, but he had already had dinner, so he gave it to me. I thought you might like it, so I gave it to you.
Question: What was special about the pizza?

聽力題目：
W: I was in Taiwan during Chinese New Year, and I went to my friend's house for dinner. Her family cooked a lot of delicious food, and they told me the meaning of each dish. I also got a red envelope with money in it. It was a very special experience for me.
Question: What is the woman talking about?

聽力題目：
M: Look at this T-shirt.
W: I love "why why"? What does that mean?
M: Oh, no. The two letters are the first letters of my name and my wife's name. We're Yan and Ying.
W: Oh, I see.
Question: Which T-shirt are the man and the woman talking about?

聽力題目：
Attention, passengers. Please don't stand near the doors. Move inside so more people can get on the train. The doors are closing. Please stand back.
Question: What does the speaker ask the passengers to do?

聽力題目：
M: That was a great meal.
W: Yes, the fish was very good.
M: I agree. But I shouldn't have eaten so much. Now my stomach hurts.
W: Well, take some rest, and you'll feel better.
Question: How did the man feel about the meal?

聽力題目：
M: I had a job interview this morning. I think it went well. The manager smiled a lot, and he said he liked my ideas. But I'm still nervous. I really want this job. I hope they'll call me soon.
Question: What is the man worried about?
